blur_detection.description: The text has moderate blur, making some characters less distinct.
blur_detection.recommendation: Enhance image sharpness before OCR processing.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Adjust contrast levels to enhance text clarity.

glare_identification.description: Minor glare is present in the upper-right corner, slightly affecting readability.
glare_identification.recommendation: Reduce glare by adjusting lighting or using a different camera angle.

water_stains.description: No water stains are detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears or folds are detected on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the bottom edge is slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections are detected on the document.

obstructions.description: No obstructions are detected on the document.

classification.error_type: File identified not as an expense
classification.error_message: The document does not contain sufficient fields to be classified as an expense.
classification.reasoning: The document text contains some numerical values and dates but lacks clear and sufficient expense-related fields such as supplier, consumer, transaction amount, and payment method. Therefore, it does not meet the criteria for being classified as an expense document.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document lacks the necessary fields to be identified as an expense document. Only numerical values and dates are present, but no clear expense-related information is provided.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing several mandatory fields including supplier and customer details, currency, total amount, and item description. These issues need to be addressed with the supplier or provider to ensure compliance with the receipt standards.
